metadata.description: Alex Orozov's personal AI agency: portable skills, agents, and hooks for Java backend engineering (Quarkus, Spring Boot, Timefold, RAG).

plugins.name: java-engineering
plugins.description: Java backend engineering conventions and workflows: Quarkus & Spring Boot standards, Java 8/17/21/25 version guides, Timefold Solver patterns, code-review and test-writer agents, Lombok/MapStruct blocker hook.

plugins.name: qa-automation
plugins.description: QA automation framework conventions: architecture, endpoint objects, UI patterns, Gatling perf testing, and reporting/DB/test-management references.
